evidence: "Wonderful, fun, and entertaining. The world as seen through the eyes of our pets. Cute."
"Students love the animated Bibleman series. Very clever videos that are engaging."
"Episode was short. Make class want more."
"Content of Story was good and Was close to original book."
"Exceptional DVD. Beyond expectation. A must have for every Religion class!"
"Unbelievably well done. Students enjoyed the incredible graphics and prayerful presentation."
"Love the Little Angel Series. Its a hit with K/1/2."
"It's always a pleasure to learn from Buck and the gang."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly, animated, and religious content, often valuing emotional engagement and production quality. They prefer simple narratives with a slower pace, showing loyalty to specific series and characters that resonate well with children.
